principle: feedback proposes revision; qualification decides promotion

cards.claim_scope: Controlled local repair-loop evidence for upload_security_001 only; no broad local LLM/general task generalization.

integrity_gate.evidence: A1 missing capabilities are represented in the revised capability manifest.

behavior_gate.evidence: A2 passes the deterministic verifier after the revision.

robustness_gate.evidence: The loop passes locally, but sandbox/holdout/metamorphic evidence is not attached.

next_required_evidence: Run the same loop in Harbor/Docker or a comparable sandbox.
Add negative, swapped-target, fake-evidence, and metamorphic controls.
Attach human or external review before broad deployment claims.

cards.claim_scope: Controlled local repair-loop evidence for data_quality_review_001 only; no broad local LLM/general task generalization.

integrity_gate.evidence: The contract repair removed A1 schema errors under an accepted gate decision.

behavior_gate.evidence: A2 passes the deterministic verifier after the revision.

robustness_gate.evidence: The loop passes locally, but sandbox/holdout/metamorphic evidence is not attached.

next_required_evidence: Run the same loop in Harbor/Docker or a comparable sandbox.
Add negative, swapped-target, fake-evidence, and metamorphic controls.
Attach human or external review before broad deployment claims.

cards.claim_scope: Controlled local repair-loop evidence for config_security_001 only; no broad local LLM/general task generalization.

integrity_gate.evidence: A1 missing capabilities are represented in the revised capability manifest.

behavior_gate.evidence: A2 still misses the same capability set: ['CONFIG_ENV_GUARD'].

robustness_gate.evidence: Robustness is not meaningful until behavior improvement is demonstrated.

next_required_evidence: Diagnose why the agent did not express the revised Skill in A2 output.

cards.claim_scope: Controlled local repair-loop evidence for api_review_001 only; no broad local LLM/general task generalization.

integrity_gate.evidence: patch_capability was selected, but the capability manifest did not add a new capability.

behavior_gate.evidence: A2 still misses the same capability set: ['API_OVERBROAD_RISK'].

robustness_gate.evidence: Robustness is not meaningful until behavior improvement is demonstrated.

next_required_evidence: Fix repair integrity before collecting more outcome evidence.

cards.claim_scope: Controlled sandboxed repair-loop evidence for real-upload-security-review only; no broad Harbor/backend generalization.

integrity_gate.evidence: A1 missing capabilities are represented in the revised capability manifest.

behavior_gate.evidence: A2 passes the deterministic verifier after the revision.

robustness_gate.evidence: A small repeatability smoke and negative controls exist for this slice.

next_required_evidence: Attach human or external review before broad deployment claims.

cards.claim_scope: Controlled sandboxed repair-loop evidence for controlled-config-security-review only; no broad Harbor/backend generalization.

integrity_gate.evidence: The output contract changed after verifier feedback.

behavior_gate.evidence: A2 passes the deterministic verifier after the revision.

robustness_gate.evidence: The loop closes in Harbor, but repeatability/metamorphic evidence is still narrow.

next_required_evidence: Add negative, swapped-target, fake-evidence, and metamorphic controls.
Attach human or external review before broad deployment claims.

cards.claim_scope: Strong controlled evidence that one offline pipeline can cover the stored task cases.

behavior_gate.evidence: This is suite-level behavior evidence, not a single deployable Skill promotion.

robustness_gate.evidence: Negative controls and verifier stress checks are separate and must remain attached.

next_required_evidence: Use this card as support for a repair-loop qualification card, not as a standalone deployment claim.

cards.claim_scope: Narrow robustness support against unsupported evidence and clean-target false positives.

integrity_gate.evidence: Unsupported evidence and append-style false positives are rejected in two controlled cases.

behavior_gate.evidence: This does not demonstrate task-solving behavior by itself.

robustness_gate.evidence: The control set is useful but still small.

next_required_evidence: Use this card as support for a repair-loop qualification card, not as a standalone deployment claim.

cards.claim_scope: Small repeatability support for the controlled Harbor upload repair loop.

integrity_gate.evidence: 3 Harbor upload repeats show stable A1 fail and A2 pass.

behavior_gate.evidence: This supports one Harbor upload loop, not broad prompt robustness.

next_required_evidence: Use this card as support for a repair-loop qualification card, not as a standalone deployment claim.
